name: MR 16 – 7 Watt | 2700 Kelvin | 500 Lumens | LED Lamp Light
description: Features Energy Efficient: Replaces 50-watt incandescent bulbs while using only 7 watts, significantly reducing energy consumption. Warm White Light: Delivers a cozy 2700K warm white glow, ideal for accent and general lighting in homes and businesses. Long Lifespan: Offers up to 25,000 hours of performance, minimizing the need for frequent bulb changes. Wide Application: Designed in MR16 shape with a GU5.3 base , suitable for recessed, track, and decorative lighting setups. Certifications & Warranty: Energy Star certified , UL listed for damp locations, and covered by a 5-year limited warranty for added peace of mind.
short_desc: Product Specifications Lighting Technology: LED Dimmable: Yes Bulb Shape: MR16 Color: Warm White Color Temperature: 2700 Kelvin Life Hours: 25,000 hours Wattage: 7 Watt Luminous Efficacy (LPW): 71 lm/W Lumen Output: 500 Lumens Voltage: 12V Ratings & Certifications: Damp Location, Energy Star Certified, UL Beam Angle: 40° Base Type: GU5.3 Halogen Equivalent: 50 Watt Height: 1.96 in. Diameter: 1.97 in. Warranty: 5-Year Limited
